zh.lifeSummary: 當Robert Bosworth於大約1470年出生在英國英格蘭諾薩普頓史爾可泰斯布盧可時，他的父親Thomas Bosworth21歲，母親Mary Anne Johnson19歲。他於1490年與Ann Martin在英國諾薩普頓史爾可泰斯布盧可結婚。他們至少是3個兒子的父母。他去世於1536年11月2日在英國諾薩普頓史爾達文崔享年67歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭諾薩普頓史爾可泰斯布盧可。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Robert Bosworth于大约1470年出生在英国英格兰諾薩普頓史爾可泰斯布盧可时，他的父亲Thomas Bosworth21岁，母亲Mary Anne Johnson19岁。他于1490年与Ann Martin在英国諾薩普頓史爾可泰斯布盧可结婚。他们至少是3个儿子的父母。他去世于1536年11月2日在英国諾薩普頓史爾達文崔享年67岁，埋葬在英国英格兰諾薩普頓史爾可泰斯布盧可。

nameMeanings.name: Bosworth
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: habitational name from Husbands Bosworth in Leicestershire (Baresworde in Domesday Book) from an Old English personal name, Bār (from bār ‘boar’) + worth ‘enclosure’, and possibly also from Market Bosworth in Leicestershire, so named with an Old English personal name Bōsa + Old English worth ‘enclosure’.

nameMeanings.name: Robert
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: One of the many French names of Germanic origin that were introduced into Britain by the Normans; it has since remained in continuous use. It is derived from the nearly synonymous elements hrōd ‘fame’ + berht ‘bright, famous’, and had a native Old English predecessor of similar form (Hreodbeorht), which was supplanted by the Norman name. Two dukes of Normandy in the 11th century bore the name: the father of William the Conqueror (sometimes identified with the legendary Robert the Devil), and his eldest son. It was borne also by three kings of Scotland, notably Robert the Bruce ( 1274–1329 ), who freed Scotland from English domination. The altered short form Bob is very common, but Hob and Dob, which were common in the Middle Ages and gave rise to surnames, are extinct. See also Rupert .

en.lifeSummary: When Robert Bosworth was born about 1470, in Cottesbrooke, Northamptonshire, England, United Kingdom, his father, Thomas Bosworth, was 21 and his mother, Mary Anne Johnson, was 19. He married Ann Martin in 1490, in Cottesbrooke, Northamptonshire, England. They were the parents of at least 3 sons. He died on 2 November 1536, in Daventry, Northamptonshire, England, at the age of 67, and was buried in Cottesbrooke, Northamptonshire, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Robert Bosworth est né environ 1470, à Cottesbrooke, Northamptonshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Thomas Bosworth, avait 21 ans et sa mère, Mary Anne Johnson, avait 19 ans. Il a épousé Ann Martin en 1490, à Cottesbrooke, Northamptonshire, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils. Il est décédé le 2 novembre 1536, à Daventry, Northamptonshire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 67 ans, et a été enterré à Cottesbrooke, Northamptonshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als Robert Bosworth um 1470 in Cottesbrooke, Northamptonshire, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater Thomas Bosworth 21 und seine Mutter Mary Anne Johnson 19. Er hat 1490 in Cottesbrooke, Northamptonshire, England Ann Martin geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne. Er starb am 2. November 1536 im Alter von 67 Jahren in Daventry, Northamptonshire, England und wurde in Cottesbrooke, Northamptonshire, England, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Robert Bosworth è nato il circa 1470 nel Cottesbrooke, Northamptonshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, il suo padre, Thomas Bosworth, aveva 21 anni e il suo madre, Mary Anne Johnson, aveva 19 anni. Lui sposato Ann Martin nel 1490, nel Cottesbrooke, Northamptonshire, England. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli. Morì il 2 novembre 1536, nel Daventry, Northamptonshire, England, all'età di 67 anni, e fu sepolto a Cottesbrooke, Northamptonshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Robert Bosworthが約1470年にイギリスイギリスノーサンプトンシュアイアコッテスブルークで生まれた時，父Thomas Bosworthは21歳，母Mary Anne Johnsonは19歳であった。1490年にイギリスノーサンプトンシュアイアコッテスブルークでAnn Martinと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子の親であった。彼は1536年11月2日にイギリスノーサンプトンシュアイアダベントリーで67歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスノーサンプトンシュアイアコッテスブルークにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Robert Bosworth(이)가 대략 1470년 영국 잉글랜드 노르섬프토실르 컷스브룩에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Thomas Bosworth(은)는 21세였고, 그의 어머니 Mary Anne Johnson(은)는 19세였다. 그는 1490년 영국 노르섬프토실르 컷스브룩에서 Ann Martin(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1536년 11월 2일 영국 노르섬프토실르 대븐트리에서 67세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 노르섬프토실르 컷스브룩에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Robert Bosworth nasceu aproximadamente 1470, em Cottesbrooke, Northamptonshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, Thomas Bosworth, tinha 21 anos e sua mãe, Mary Anne Johnson, tinha 19 anos. Ele casou-se com Ann Martin em 1490, em Cottesbrooke, Northamptonshire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos. Ele faleceu em 2 de novembro de 1536, em Daventry, Northamptonshire, Inglaterra, com 67 anos, e foi sepultado em Cottesbrooke, Northamptonshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Robert Bosworth родился около 1470 г. в местности коттесбрук, нортамптоншир, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Thomas Bosworth было 21 год, а матери, которую звали Mary Anne Johnson, 19. Он женился на женщине по имени Ann Martin в 1490 г. в местности коттесбрук, нортамптоншир, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына. Он умер 2 ноября 1536 г. в местности давентри, нортамптоншир, Англия в возрасте 67 лет и был похоронен в местности коттесбрук, нортамптоншир, Англия, Великобритания.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Robert Bosworth nació aproximadamente 1470, en Cottesbrooke, Northamptonshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, Thomas Bosworth, tenía 21 años y su mamá, Mary Anne Johnson, tenía 19 años. Se casó con Ann Martin en 1490, en Cottesbrooke, Northamptonshire, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos. Murió el 2 de noviembre de 1536, en Daventry, Northamptonshire, Inglaterra, a la edad de 67 años, y fue sepultado en Cottesbrooke, Northamptonshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
